guest: Steven (Mr. 312), Co-Founder and CEO of Cameo

business_ideas.idea: Marketplace for personalized video messages from celebrities (Cameo)
Two-way asynchronous conversations between celebrities and fans (future vision)

predictions.text: Personalized video from celebrities will eventually rival in-person meet-and-greets in value
Creator economy platforms expand beyond written content to video and immersive experiences

dynamics: Steven leads with marketplace insights; Sam probes storytelling angles. Collaborative energy building narrative arc from idea to launch. Steven emphasizes marketplace dynamics, chicken-and-egg problem solving.
frameworks: Marketplace flywheel (talent begets demand, demand begets more talent)
Authentic over polished creative (raw smartphone video > professional production)
Long-tail talent penetration (capture rising creators, not just established celebrities)
learnings: Marketplace launches require overcoming chicken-and-egg by recruiting supply through warm networks first
Celebrity willingness to participate depends on ease (7-day turnaround, simple interface)
Fan reaction videos become powerful marketing asset and proof of value

banger_quotes.quote: This father filmed his daughter's response it was the moment we knew

numbers_dropped: 300M valuation reported at time of episode
20,000 talent on platform by episode time
notable: Cassius Marsh (NFL player) was first talent; early pivot from multiple experience types (in-person, basketball games) to focused video offering; launched at Duke fraternity as startup.
